case_title: S.F. TOWN TAXI, INC. VS. JAMES GRAESSIE et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-18-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-18-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JACOB MAYZEL--GENERAL MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-18-2013 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,955.53 FILED BY S.F. TOWN TAXI, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GRAESSIE, JAMES WON, STEVEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF S.F. TOWN TAXI, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRAESSIE, JAMES WON, STEVEN $1,955.53 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,130.53, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST STEVEN WON IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE, NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $125.00) SERVED FEB-04-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GRAESSIE, JAMES
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO STEVEN WON BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAR-18-2013 AT 1:30 PM.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF S.F. TOWN TAXI, INC.
